name: 3-Day Powerbuilder - Strength and Mass
description:
Intermediate-advanced Powerbuilder program. Heavy compound days for strength, full-body hypertrophy day for size. Smith machine for incline press and calf raises. 3x/week. Uses RPE for intensity.

If you want more volume, add an extra full-body day.

weeks.description: Learn the movement patterns and find working weights. Compounds at RPE 7, accessories at RPE 6. Focus on bar path and bracing — leave plenty in the tank.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Adjust safety catches on the side rails to allow full ROM with a safe bail.

weeks.description: Bump compounds to RPE 8, accessories to RPE 7. Add small weight jumps to the big lifts. Hypertrophy day should start feeling like real work.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Adjust safety catches on the side rails to allow full ROM with a safe bail.

weeks.description: Hold RPE 8 on compounds, RPE 7 on accessories. Focus on execution quality — same intensity as week 2 but tighter reps. Add weight only if last week moved well.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Adjust safety catches on the side rails to allow full ROM with a safe bail.

weeks.description: Compounds push to RPE 9, accessories to RPE 8. Heaviest week. Singles or doubles on the big lifts are optional. Every set should be challenging.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Adjust safety catches on the side rails to allow full ROM with a safe bail.

weeks.description: Back off to RPE 6 across the board. Same movements, lighter loads. Drop a set from each exercise if needed. Recover and prep for the next cycle.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Pull to forehead height, externally rotate at the top. Pause briefly.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Adjust safety catches on the side rails to allow full ROM with a safe bail.
